versions.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install grafana-operator oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=grafana-operator:v5.20.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install finops-agent-kof oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=finops-agent-kof:0.1.3" \
  -n kcm-system
versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   grafana-operator-v5-20-0        true
# kcm-system   finops-agent-kof-0-1-3          true
versions.deployHtml:
FinOps Agent assumes that: 1. the user has kof installed with the k0rdent. 2. the Grafana instance deployed with kof having Infinity plugin(v3.4.1) installed. MultiClusterService to deploy Finops Agent tested with kof v1.3.0: 

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: finops-agent
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      k0rdent.mirantis.com/management-cluster: "true"
      sveltos-agent: present
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: finops-agent-kof-0-1-3
      name: finops-agent-kof
      namespace: finops
Verify the services are deployed: - Verify the FinOps Agent is deployed ``bash kubectl get pod -n finops ` - Verify that the Grafana resources are available `bash kubectl get grafanadashboard -n kof kubectl get grafanadatasource -n finops ``
